name: Ashroot Wand
description: A responsive student wand with a warm pulse near old stone.

name: Moonmilk Tonic
description: Restores a small amount of health after duels and risky exploration.

name: Brass House Pin
description: A polished badge that records your house points in faint golden script.

name: Glimmercap
description: A tiny mushroom that flashes when stirred in the correct order.

name: Duelist Token
description: A silver practice token awarded for a clean arena victory.
